title: Me Robo Al Patron Y El Negocio Tambien
original_title: Me Robo Al Patron Y El Negocio Tambien
overview: Reina, a strong and determined woman, discovers that her husband Ramiro and her best friend Angela have betrayed her. Not only are they involved in a secret relationship, but they are also planning to take control of the business she helped build from nothing.  After a violent confrontation, Reina believes she has ended their threat and walks away from her past. However, she soon learns that both are still alive and expanding their power in an attempt to dominate the territory.  Forced to return, Reina enters a ruthless conflict where pride, power, and revenge collide.  In a world where betrayal has lasting consequences, Reina must confront her past and prove that pain can be transformed into strength.
